raw: Each pass admits up to 4 adults for $5 each (General Admission only). The discount only works for up to 4 Adult priced tickets and any additional ticket will be normally priced (Children under 18 are always free and should be reserved as child tickets). This is a printable pass. You will receive the pass in your email or library staff can print it for you after you have booked the library coupon.

source_phrases.free_under_age: Children under 18 are always free and should be reserved as child tickets
